question_tagalog: Kapag hindi ako nagre-reply agad, anong unang pumapasok sa isip mo?
question_english: When I don't reply immediately, what first comes to your mind?
quote_tagalog: Pasensya na, overthinker lang talaga ako minsan.
quote_english: Sorry, I'm just an overthinker sometimes.

question_tagalog: Madalas mo ba isipin na baka magsawa ako sayo balang araw?
question_english: Do you often think I might get tired of you someday?
quote_tagalog: Araw-araw kitang pipiliin, paulit-ulit.
quote_english: I will choose you everyday, over and over.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba minsan na baka may nahanap akong iba pag nasa labas ako?
question_english: Do you sometimes think I might find someone else when I'm out?
quote_tagalog: Sa dami ng tao sa labas, ikaw lang ang gusto kong uwian.
quote_english: With so many people out there, you're the only one I want to come home to.

question_tagalog: Ano yung maliit kong action na sobrang napago-overthink mo?
question_english: What small action of mine makes you overthink a lot?
quote_tagalog: Wag mo nang isipin, ikaw lang ang mahal ko.
quote_english: Stop overthinking it, you're the only one I love.

question_tagalog: Kapag malamig ang text ko, iniisip mo ba na galit ako?
question_english: When my texts are cold, do you think I'm mad?
quote_tagalog: Pagod lang marahil, pero never nagbago ang tingin sayo.
quote_english: Probably just tired, but my view of you never changed.

question_tagalog: Na-experience mo na bang hindi makatulog kakaisip ng 'what ifs' natin?
question_english: Have you experienced not being able to sleep thinking about our 'what ifs'?
quote_tagalog: Ang tanging 'what if' ko ay paano kung mas napaaga kitang nakilala.
quote_english: My only 'what if' is what if I met you earlier.

question_tagalog: Sa tingin mo ba, nakaka-apekto yung overthinking mo sa relationship natin?
question_english: Do you think your overthinking affects our relationship?
quote_tagalog: Intindihin natin ang isa't isa kasama na ang in-securities natin.
quote_english: Let's understand each other including our insecurities.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo huling in-stalk ang social media ko dahil nag-overthink ka?
question_english: When was the last time you stalked my social media because you overthought?
quote_tagalog: Bukas ang libro ng buhay ko para sayo.
quote_english: The book of my life is open for you.

question_tagalog: Kapag tahimik tayo pareho, iniisip mo bang may problema ako sayo?
question_english: When we're both quiet, do you think I have a problem with you?
quote_tagalog: Minsan ang meaning ng silence ay comfort lang.
quote_english: Sometimes the meaning of silence is just comfort.

question_tagalog: Ano ang pinaka-weird na scenario na nabuo ng overthinking mo?
question_english: What is the weirdest scenario formed by your overthinking?
quote_tagalog: Nakakatawa, pero valid ang feelings mo.
quote_english: It's funny, but your feelings are valid.

question_tagalog: Natatakot ka ba minsan na baka hindi ka enough para sakin?
question_english: Do you sometimes fear that you might not be enough for me?
quote_tagalog: Sobra-sobra ka pa sa hinihiling ko.
quote_english: You are more than what I asked for.

question_tagalog: Kapag nagkasakit ako, nago-overthink ka ba agad sa malalalang sakit?
question_english: When I get sick, do you immediately overthink worse diseases?
quote_tagalog: Aalagaan kita hanggang sa gumaling ka.
quote_english: I will take care of you until you get better.

question_tagalog: Paano ko mapapakalma yung utak mo kapag nag-start ka na mag-overthink?
question_english: How can I calm your mind when you start overthinking?
quote_tagalog: Yakap lang kita, mawawala lahat ng takot mo.
quote_english: I'll just hug you, all your fears will go away.

question_tagalog: Iniisip mo ba minsan ang 'what if' na iiwan kita in the future?
question_english: Do you sometimes think of the 'what if' I'll leave you in the future?
quote_tagalog: Walang aalis, sabay tayong lalaban in the future.
quote_english: No one's leaving, we will fight together in the future.

question_tagalog: Nao-overthink mo ba kapag may bago akong friend na na-meet?
question_english: Do you overthink when I meet a new friend?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang only one ko, friend lang sila.
quote_english: You are my only one, they are just friends.

question_tagalog: Bakit feeling mo madalas kang nago-overthink nang walang dahilan?
question_english: Why do you feel you often overthink without a reason?
quote_tagalog: Baka trauma ng past na gusto kitang i-heal.
quote_english: Maybe it's past trauma that I want to heal.

question_tagalog: Nai-stress ka ba sa mga simple text ko na parang seryoso?
question_english: Do you get stressed about my simple texts that seem serious?
quote_tagalog: Wag masyado basahin, madalas literal lang yon.
quote_english: Don't read into it too much, it's often just literal.

question_tagalog: Kapag may nakaaway ka, nago-overthink ka ba kung sino sisisihin ko?
question_english: When you fight with someone, do you overthink who I'll blame?
quote_tagalog: Kakampi mo ko palagi, tama man o mali.
quote_english: I'm always on your side, right or wrong.

question_tagalog: May time ba nag-overthink ka na hindi kita love talaga?
question_english: Was there a time you overthought that I didn't really love you?
quote_tagalog: Mahal kita higit pa sa inaakala mo.
quote_english: I love you more than you think.

question_tagalog: Gaano ka-lala yung overthinking mo kapag may event at hindi tayo magkasama?
question_english: How bad is your overthinking when there's an event and we're not together?
quote_tagalog: Kahit malayo, ikaw lang naiisip ko.
quote_english: Even if far, you're the only one I think of.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba na baka nakakaabala ka na saken kapag busy ako?
question_english: Do you think you might be bothering me when I'm busy?
quote_tagalog: Never kang naging abala sa buhay ko.
quote_english: You were never a bother in my life.

question_tagalog: Iniisip mo ba madalas na judgmental yung family/friends ko sayo?
question_english: Do you often think my family/friends are judgmental of you?
quote_tagalog: Tanggap ka nila gaya ng pagtanggap ko sayo.
quote_english: They accept you just like how I accept you.

question_tagalog: Paano mo sine-save yung sarili mo sa deep episodes of overthinking?
question_english: How do you save yourself from deep episodes of overthinking?
quote_tagalog: Nandito lang ako para hilahin ka pabalik sa reality.
quote_english: I'm just here to pull you back to reality.

question_tagalog: Nao-overthink mo rin ba pati yung finances natin sa future?
question_english: Do you also overthink even our finances in the future?
quote_tagalog: Wag mag-alala, magtutulungan tayo para umasenso.
quote_english: Don't worry, we'll help each other to succeed.

question_tagalog: Kapag hindi ako nag-'I love you' back agad, anong first reaction mo?
question_english: When I don't reply 'I love you' immediately, what's your first reaction?
quote_tagalog: I love you, lagi at palagi.
quote_english: I love you, always and forever.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba na baka may magpakita sakin na mas better sayo?
question_english: Do you think someone better than you might appear to me?
quote_tagalog: Kahit marami pang mas 'better', sayo lang ako.
quote_english: Even if there are many 'better', I'm only yours.

question_tagalog: Kapag nagkaka-misunderstanding tayo, nago-overthink ka ba na makikipag-break nako?
question_english: When we have a misunderstanding, do you overthink I'll break up with you?
quote_tagalog: Aayusin natin to, hindi tayo susuko.
quote_english: We'll fix this, we're not giving up.

question_tagalog: Iniisip mo ba kung paano kung nagkita tayo sa maling panahon?
question_english: Do you think what if we met at the wrong time?
quote_tagalog: Ang tamang tao sa tamang panahon, ay tayo ngayon.
quote_english: The right people at the right time, is us now.

question_tagalog: Nao-overthink mo ba kapag nakita mo kong may kaharap na phone tapos nakangiti?
question_english: Do you overthink when you see me smiling while facing my phone?
quote_tagalog: Cute animal videos lang pinapanuod ko, pramis.
quote_english: I'm just watching cute animal videos, promise.

question_tagalog: Minsan ba napa-overthink ka sa pabiro kong salita?
question_english: Did you sometimes overthink my joking words?
quote_tagalog: Sorry kung biro lang sana yon, babawi ako.
quote_english: Sorry if it was supposed to be a joke, I'll make it up.

question_tagalog: Gaano kagulo yung utak mo kapag magkahiwalay tayo nang ilang araw?
question_english: How messy is your mind when we're apart for a few days?
